query:
DELETE FROM pictures
               WHERE local_user_id = $1
                 AND owner_username = $2
                 AND owner_instance_domain = $3
                 AND remote_picture_id IS NOT NULL
                 AND NOT EXISTS (
                     SELECT 1 FROM tags
                     WHERE tags.picture_id = pictures.id
                       AND tags.source = 'incoming_share'::tag_source
                 )
